questions.question: Placeholder question 1 about organizational complexity. Which placeholder AWS organization design meets compliance requirements?
questions.explanation: Placeholder explanation: Org Design C uses proper SCP hierarchies for compliance. Design A does not enforce guardrails at the OU level.

questions.question: Placeholder question 2 about new solutions. Which TWO placeholder AWS services should be used for this architecture?
questions.explanation: Placeholder explanation: Services 1 and 4 together implement the required functionality. Service 2 adds unnecessary complexity.

questions.question: Placeholder question 3 about continuous improvement. Which placeholder optimization approach reduces costs?
questions.explanation: Placeholder explanation: Optimization B identifies the highest-cost resources and applies the right purchasing model. Optimization A applies savings plans incorrectly.

questions.question: Placeholder question 4 about migration. Which placeholder migration strategy fits this legacy workload?
questions.explanation: Placeholder explanation: Migration Strategy 4 is the right R-strategy for this workload. Strategy 1 would require extensive refactoring.

questions.question: Placeholder question 5 about organizational complexity. This hard placeholder tests multi-account security patterns.
questions.explanation: Placeholder explanation: Pattern A implements centralized security with proper delegation. Pattern B creates management overhead without improving security.

questions.question: Placeholder question 6 about new solutions. Which placeholder high-availability pattern is appropriate?
questions.explanation: Placeholder explanation: HA Pattern C provides multi-AZ redundancy. Pattern A uses a single AZ which creates an availability risk.

questions.question: Placeholder question 7 about continuous improvement. Which TWO placeholder reliability improvements should be made?
questions.explanation: Placeholder explanation: Improvements 2 and 3 address the identified failure modes. Improvement 1 would add latency without improving reliability.

questions.question: Placeholder question 8 about migration. Which placeholder database migration approach minimizes downtime?
questions.explanation: Placeholder explanation: DB Migration A uses online replication to minimize downtime. Migration B requires a full maintenance window.

questions.question: Placeholder question 9 about organizational design. This easy placeholder tests AWS Organizations concepts.
questions.explanation: Placeholder explanation: Org Concept 4 correctly describes the account hierarchy. Concepts 1 and 2 confuse OUs and accounts.

questions.question: Placeholder question 10 about new solution design. This hard multi-answer placeholder tests network architecture.
questions.explanation: Placeholder explanation: Architectures 2 and 5 together implement the hub-and-spoke network model correctly. Architecture 1 creates routing asymmetry.
